labels: enhancement

### Problem

<!--
What is the friction or gap that motivated this request?
Be concrete: "users can't see their pending Flaunch fees" beats "tiles are confusing".
-->

### Proposed change

<!-- What you would like to see. Keep it scoped. -->

### Who benefits

<!-- Bettors, tile holders, oracle operators, developers? -->

### Alternatives considered

<!--
Is there a workaround today? Would a doc change or UX tweak solve it instead of new code?
-->

### Risks / trade-offs

<!--
Gas cost, contract complexity, breaking change for existing users, new infra to run, etc.
-->
